articles.author: Brooke Steinberg
articles.title: New app alerts users at risk of being filmed with smart glasses - New York Post
articles.description: The app’s developer described smart glasses as an “intolerable intrusion, consent-neglecting, horrible piece of tech.”
articles.content:
Not ready for your closeup?
A new app will be able to tell you if someone nearby is wearing smart glasses.
Smart glasses often look just like regular glasses, so if someone nearby is wearing one of… [+3833 chars]
